PROP-baseauction-pre-012.text: Bid for assetOut token itself must be impossible (assetOut is payment, not auctioned).
PROP-baseauction-pre-012.assertion: bid(s_assetOut, amount, data) cannot succeed (no auction for assetOut)

locations.note: line 421: reads s_auctionStarts[asset]; performUpkeep at line 350 never sets auctionStart for s_assetOut, so bid reverts at line 425 with InvalidAuction
